patientLookupEmail.title: Patient lookup email
patientLookupEmail.description: Plain email address string only (e.g. meera.iyer@example.com). Pass the raw email as a simple string. Do NOT wrap it in an object and do NOT include recipientId, subject, body, to, cc, or any other fields. Not a Salesforce Account or Contact Id.

healthcareFacilityId.title: Healthcare Facility ID
healthcareFacilityId.description: HealthcareFacility Id from Find Facilities plannerReferenceText (from discovery tools—not typed by the patient).

healthcareProviderId.title: Healthcare Provider ID
healthcareProviderId.description: HealthcareProvider Id from Find Providers or Get Slots plannerReferenceText (from discovery tools—not typed by the patient).

workTypeId.title: Work Type ID
workTypeId.description: WorkType Id; omit to default to Onco New Consult.

startTimeUtc.title: Start Time UTC
startTimeUtc.description: Exact ISO 8601 UTC start time as shown on the slot line (e.g. 2026-04-20T03:54:11Z). Copy from Get Available Appointment Slots output.
